message:
test(extensions): add runtime-risk quantile E2E evidence and validation suites (bd-xqipg)

Add two comprehensive test suites for runtime-risk quantile optimization:

runtime_risk_quantile_evidence.rs (790 lines)
----------------------------------------------
E2E evidence tests validating:
- Quantile-based conformal prediction under deterministic
  harden/quarantine/recovery decision flows
- Structured JSONL decision logging with full metadata
  (extension_id, capability, action, risk_score, threshold)
- Reproducibility artifacts (env.json, manifest.json) with checksums
- Budget enforcement with fail-closed behavior on exhaustion
- Integration with TestHarness for artifact tracking and normalization

runtime_risk_quantile_validation.rs (908 lines)
-------------------------------------------------
Validation suite covering:
- E2E replay for harden and quarantine flows with deterministic fixtures
- Structured JSONL log emission with decision metadata and timing
- Reproducibility artifacts with schema version validation
- Bounded test runtime budgets with fail-closed on exhaustion
- Calibration pipeline (calibrate_runtime_risk_from_ledger) validation
- Ledger artifact replay and verification round-trips

Both suites exercise the full hostcall dispatch path through
ExtensionManager with RuntimeRiskConfig and quantile-calibrated
thresholds, producing JSONL evidence artifacts suitable for CI
gate verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
